verses.text: Tua ciangin Moses leh Israel mite in Topa' tungah hih la sa uh a, “ Topa phatna la ka sa ding hi. Amah in minthangin zo khin a, amah in sakol leh a tuangpa tuipi sungah a lawn hi
Topa, kei a hong hupa hi a, keimah hong honkhiapa ahi hi. Amah, keima Pasian hi a, amah ka phat ding hi. Ka pa' Pasian hi a, amah ka liansak ding hi
Topa, galhangpa hi a, Topa, ama min ahi hi
“Faro' leengte leh a mihonpite tuipi sungah lawn a, a kitengkhia ama uliante San Tuipi sungah tum hi
Tui in amaute tuum a, suangtum bangin a thukna sungah amaute kia suk uh hi
“ Topa aw, na taklam khut, thahatin minthang a, Topa aw, na taklam khut in galte a thehthang hi
Na vangliatna tawh nangmah in na langte na lawnthal hi. Na hehna na khahkhia a, tua in amaute buhkung bangin a kangtum hi
Na nak ging tawh tuite kiciangto-in, tuite a lomin dingto a, tuipi sungah tui thukpi a khal hi
Galte in, ‘Ka delh ding a, ka pha ding hi. A nate uh ka hawm ding a, ka deih zahzahin, tuate ka tang ding hi. Ka namsau ka dok ding a, ka khut in amaute susia ding hi,’ ci hi
Nang in na huih tawh na mut a, tuipi in amaute tuum hi. A kihtakhuai tui sungah haknaw bangin amaute tum uh hi
“ Topa aw, pasian-te' lakah kua, nang tawh kibang ahi hiam? Kua, nang tawh kibangin, siangthona-ah lianin, minthang nasepna-ah kihtakhuai-in, na lamdang sem ahi hiam
Na taklam khut na zan a, leitung in amaute nawmvalh hi
Nangmah in na ciamsa zui-in na tatkhiatsa mite na paipih a, na hatna tawh a siangtho na omna-ah amaute lam na lak hi
Midangte in hih thu za khin uh a, amaute ling uh hi. Filistia-ah a teng mite lau-in lingcip uh hi
Tu-in Edom ukpite lungkia uh a, Moab makaite, lingcip uh hi. Kanaan-ah a teng mi khempeuh a han'na uh beita hi

Launa leh kihtakna amaute' tungah tung a, a thahat na vangliatna hangin amaute suangtum bangin taang loin om uh hi. Topa aw, nangma mite in a khen' mateng, na leisa mite in a khen' mateng amaute khikcip uh hi
Nang in amaute hong paipihin nangma mual tungah amaute na suan ding hi. Topa aw, na omna ding munin na bawlsa munah, Topa aw, na khutte in a phuhsa na biakinn-ah na koih ding hi
Topa in uk tawntung ding hi,” a ci uh hi.
